extra.lens: Kowa LM5JCM 5mm f/2.8-16 C-mount (2/3" image circle)
extra.mount_note: C-mount lens on CS-mount body requires a 5mm C-to-CS adapter ring
extra.angular_fov_note: HFOV ~52.8 deg on IMX273 4.97x3.73mm; VFOV ~40.9 deg; DFOV ~63.7 deg
extra.linear_fov_note: at WD 3m (exact): H ~2.98m x V ~2.23m; range 2-4m -> H ~1.98-3.97m (see lens.py)
